Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.chat

Class Emoji

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.youtube.chat.Emoji
public class Emoji extends Object
Emoji segment in an extended YouTube chat message.
Since:
1.0.0
